text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin are both
racing? This is gonna be great!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw BNW at the Kikuka Sho, and it's
always amazing when they face off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the stands for today's race, fans are
anticipating an exciting showdown between
Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So many fans called out to me on the way here, it
was crazy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That means they have high hopes, right? I'll do
my best and give them a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I hope I can meet their expectations. I'm so nervous, it's making me feel all itchy!
choice_data_list:
You've just got to go out there and achieve
something great!

You've just got to go out there and achieve
something great!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Okay, gotta do my best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I did what I could during training. All that's left is
to get in the spirit... WOOHOO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go! See you, Trainer!
